message:
refactor(codegen): Consolidate mutation tracking to passes system

- Delete mutation_analysis.zig and usage_analysis.zig (~1600 lines removed)
- Wire core.zig isVarMutated/isVarAugAssigned/isVarUnused to use passes system
- Add on-demand function analysis in body.zig for class methods not in IR
- Fix isVarMutatedInFunction/isVarUnusedInFunction fallbacks to be conservative
- Update all callers to use body.zig facade instead of deleted modules

Single code path: passes system is now sole source of mutation tracking.
Pass 7 analyzes IR functions; body.zig analyzes class methods during codegen.
